import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints_into(_ acc: List<Int>, _ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result = acc
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut b = 0
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(x)
      b = x
    when None
      b = 0
    end
    if b <= 32
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut value = 0
      mut done = false
      while i < n and not done
        mut c = 0
        match string.byte_at(s, i)
        when Some(x)
          c = x
        when None
          c = 0
        end
        if c >= 48 and c <= 57
          value = value * 10 + (c - 48)
          i = i + 1
        else
          done = true
        end
      end
      result = list.push(result, value * sign)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sort_unique(_ all: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut prev = 0
  mut has_prev = false
  mut continue_loop = true
  while continue_loop
    mut found = false
    mut best = 0
    let m = all.len()
    mut j = 0
    while j < m
      match all.get(j)
      when Some(v)
        if (not has_prev or v > prev) and (not found or v < best)
          best = v
          found = true
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    if found
      sorted = list.push(sorted, best)
      prev = best
      has_prev = true
    else
      continue_loop = false
    end
  end
  sorted
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut all: List<Int> = []
all = parse_ints_into(all, line1)
all = parse_ints_into(all, line2)

let sorted = sort_unique(all)

mut out = ""
mut idx = 0
let k = sorted.len()
while idx < k
  match sorted.get(idx)
  when Some(v)
    if idx == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  idx = idx + 1
end
println(out)
